## v0.5.1 — 2026-07-12

### Installer & Ops
- New one-command installer creates dedicated `scantrace` user (nologin), seeds env at `/etc/scantrace/scantrace.env`, installs binary to `/opt/scantrace/bin/`, and enables the service.
- Systemd unit hardened: runs as `scantrace:scantrace`, least privileges, limited write paths.

### LLM Defaults & Robustness
- Default `LLM_BASE_URL` to `http://127.0.0.1:11434`.
- LLM client strips trailing `/v1` from `LLM_BASE_URL` to prevent `/v1/v1/...` errors.
- `.env.example`, INSTALL, ARCHITECTURE, TROUBLESHOOTING docs updated.

### How to upgrade
```bash
git pull --ff-only
./scripts/install-service.sh
sudoedit /etc/scantrace/scantrace.env   # verify tokens/channel IDs
sudo systemctl restart scantrace-agent
```
